name: Aaryan Patel
aboutMe: I spend most of my free time working on projects and tinkering with my homelab, whatever looks interesting. I like picking up new tech and seeing how far I can push an idea. When I'm not coding or building something new, I'm usually at the gym or watching UFC.

courses.name: Elementary Algorithm Design and Data Abstraction

clubs.title: Data Science Club
desc: Developed QR code check-in system and admin portal for seamless event management and member tracking
Built public calendar interface to visualize past and upcoming events with responsive frontend design
Led the development of the custom exec application portal to streamline future applicant recruitment and evaluation processes
Spearheaded the overhaul of the server architecture into clean, organized layers to improve code readability for new developers
Enhanced frontend responsiveness and established consistent design theme to reduce onboarding time for new members

clubs.title: WATOnomous
desc: Learned ROS pub-sub architecture and messaging patterns for autonomous vehicle software communication
Gained exposure to multi-modal sensor data streams from LiDAR, cameras, radar, and GPS through ROS topics
Explored distributed system concepts for scalable autonomous driving software using decentralized ROS nodes
Studied robotics software patterns for real-world autonomous vehicle challenges and V2V/V2I communications

experience.title: DevOps Engineer Intern
description: Engineered a multi-cloud deployment architecture for distributed app across Azure and AWS clusters by using GitHub Actions pipelines and Helm charts to orchestrate the build and release of 3 Dockerized microservices
Accelerated container security scanning speeds by over 77% for Capital Markets teams by migrating legacy scanning protocols to Aqua SaaS Cloud, significantly reducing Jenkins CI/CD pipeline latency
Enabled verification of Docker image signatures for an application by provisioning Virtual Machines with custom CA bundles, ensuring only trusted code runs in production

experience.title: Backend/API Developer
description: Contributed to scalable backend APIs for browser-extension platform, using Node.js + Fastify with Postgres and Redis to layer real-time conversation and personalized content onto any webpage

Standardized codebase by authoring reusable Cursor rule packs that enforce layered architecture, uniform error handling, and code consistency, enabling faster, conflict-free feature rollouts across teams

Architected an AI-driven code-gen pipeline that ingests product docs & Cursor rules to auto-scaffold Fastify services, database schemas, cache layers, and Vitest tests, cutting API development from months to days

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
description: Developed full-stack trading analytics platform using React, Next.js, Kubernetes, and MongoDB, leveraging AI-driven trade reports enhance market predictions and decision-making for traders
Utilized Redux for state management and React Query for API integration and caching, reducing API call latency by 40% and ensuring real-time updates for datasets exceeding 20K rows

Introduced interactive Liquidity Matrix feature to analyzes & visualizes FX market liquidity across 24 trading hours, providing actionable insights with an interactive and concise interface to improve trading decisions
Leveraged Highcharts, AG Grid, and React Virtualized to improve index analytics performance by 35% with dynamic visualizations & auto-complete filtering, delivering a seamless user experience

experience.title: Application Developer
description: Specialized in building and managing cloud-based API ecosystems using Google Cloud as well as deploying, monitoring, and managing enterprise solutions on the cloud
Designed and deployed a PostgreSQL database integrated with Keycloak, streamlining authentication process
Leveraged Terraform to automate infrastructure provisioning, which optimized deployment time by up to 70%, significant enhancing operational efficiency

experience.title: Software Developer
description: Developed backend solutions using C#, ASP.NET, and SQL Server, contributing to the architecture, implementation, and maintenance of pipeline integrity management application
Led the optimization of SQL queries, significantly enhancing the performance of the data management REST API, which improved dynamic data retrieval and display
Introduced new visualization feature that displayed risk level results for predictive risk analysis, aiding in better decision-making for pipeline integrity management
Lead migration of APIs to a high-performance serialization library, boosting API performance by up to 50%

experience.title: Junior Developer
description: Development using Angular, TypeScript, HTML & CSS, improving overall application functionality
Lead the redesigning of a POS inventory application to better meet the specific needs of a telecom client, enhancing user satisfaction and operational efficiency
Improved inventory management functionalities using RESTful APIs, resulting in a more intuitive user experience

featuredProjects.title: G.R.A.C.E.
featuredProjects.description: An AI-powered social companion that engages isolated users through lifelike face-to-face conversations with real-time voice-to-avatar interactions. Features lip-synced 3D avatars and a comprehensive caregiver dashboard with conversation analytics.

featuredProjects.title: AniTrack
featuredProjects.description: Full-stack anime tracking application that allows users to discover popular anime, write reviews, add new titles, find friends with shared interests, and manage their watch history. Features comprehensive database management and community-driven content.
features: Add new anime titles to the database
Find friends with similar anime interests
Track personal watch history and progress

featuredProjects.title: STYLit

Engineered a normalized, indexed PostgreSQL database supporting 500+ members and 25+ events
Redesigned API architecture with layered structure for improved modularity, maintainability, and scalability
